args.text: LLMs coordinate well on env-state tasks but fail at partner intent modeling (2310.03903). CAC framework uses auxiliary LLMs for theory-of-mind. Multi-agent systems need explicit belief inference, not just shared context. Critical gap for any agentic mesh.

Survey 2404.14294: speculative decoding gives 2-3x throughput with zero quality loss. Draft model proposes, large model verifies in parallel. KV cache compression + continuous batching are the other two levers. My inference cascade should route speculatively, not sequentially.
